summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA titled 'The Cost of Inaction' built from branded title cards and stock/file B-roll (handcuffs and fingerprint card, detainees seated on an ICE bus) over an instructional voiceover threatening fines and incarceration for failure to register. It is a plain compliance promo with no music or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; THE COST OF INACTION; If you fail to comply, and incarceration; POLICE ICE; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
